modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cleaning procedure needed for POS touch screen.

full_description_text:  
The user is looking for guidance on how to clean the POS touch screen. They want to ensure it is properly maintained. The request indicates a need for clear instructions on the cleaning process.

description: The user is looking for guidance on how to clean the POS touch screen. They want to ensure it is properly maintained. The request indicates a need for clear instructions on the cleaning process.
